resources.string: Take charge of your spending with detailed tracking of your fuel and maintenance expenses. Monitor every penny to ensure your budget stays on track and your savings grow.
Simplify your vehicle management by keeping all refuel logs and repair information together. No more searching for receipts or maintenance records—everything you need is right here.

Gain valuable insights with clear statistics on your fuel consumption and maintenance costs. Make informed decisions with easy-to-read graphs and summaries, designed to help you optimize your vehicle\'s performance.
Password must contain at least one digit.
Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
Password must be at least 8 characters long.
Password must contain at least one special character.
Password must contain at least one digit, one special character, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and be at least 8 characters long.
Unable to load data from the database. Please try again later.
No data found. Please check your search criteria and try again.
Error while accessing storage. Please ensure you have sufficient permissions and space.
Sorry, an unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
